---
title: "Fichas por candidato"
---

```{r}
#| results: asis
project_dir <- normalizePath("..", winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
source(file.path(project_dir, "R", "site_helpers.R"))

candidates <- read_candidate_registry_public(project_dir) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$ballot_position)
dossiers <- read_processed_table("candidate_dossiers.csv", project_dir = project_dir)

cat('<p class="section-intro">Cada ficha consolida la trazabilidad básica del candidato, los claims públicos disponibles, las notas analíticas conservadoras y la evidencia fuente.</p>')

cards <- purrr::pmap_chr(candidates, function(candidate_id, slug, president_name, vicepresident_name, ballot_position, watchlist_active, watchlist_priority, ...) {
  dossier <- dossiers |> dplyr::filter(.data$candidate_id == candidate_id)
  total_claims <- if (nrow(dossier) == 0) 0 else dossier$total_claims[[1]]
  total_analysis <- if (nrow(dossier) == 0) 0 else dossier$total_analysis_notes[[1]]
  ideology_label <- if (nrow(dossier) == 0) "Evidencia insuficiente" else dossier$ideology_label[[1]]
  badge <- if (isTRUE(watchlist_active)) {
    paste0('<span class="candidate-badge">Watchlist #', watchlist_priority, '</span>')
  } else {
    '<span class="candidate-badge candidate-badge--muted">Cobertura secundaria</span>'
  }

  paste0(
    '<div class="candidate-card">',
    badge,
    '<h3><a href="', slug, '.html">', president_name, '</a></h3>',
    '<div class="candidate-card__meta">Vice: ', vicepresident_name, '</div>',
    '<div class="candidate-card__meta">Tarjetón: ', ballot_position, '</div>',
    '<div class="candidate-card__meta"><strong>Espectro analítico:</strong> ', ideology_label, '</div>',
    '<div class="candidate-card__meta">Claims públicos: ', total_claims, '</div>',
    '<div class="candidate-card__meta">Notas IA: ', total_analysis, '</div>',
    '</div>'
  )
})

cat(paste0('<div class="candidate-grid">', paste(cards, collapse = ""), '</div>'))
```
